title: Bee Removal in Somers, NY | $350-$550 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional bee removal services in Somers, Westchester. Safe, humane bee and hive removal from homes and businesses. Call today for fast service: $350-$550.
intro: Best Pest Control NYC provides expert bee removal services throughout Somers, NY, protecting homes and businesses from unwanted bee colonies and hives. Our licensed technicians safely remove bees from properties while prioritizing both human safety and environmental responsibility. With same-day service available, we're your trusted solution for bee problems in Westchester County.
whyUs: Our Somers bee removal specialists combine over 15 years of experience with humane removal techniques that relocate bees whenever possible. We serve all of Somers, from historic properties near Lasdon Park to rural estates and suburban neighborhoods, with transparent pricing and guaranteed results.
localContext: Somers' blend of wooded properties, historic homes, and proximity to natural areas like Muscoot Reservoir creates ideal habitats for bee colonies in attics, wall voids, and tree cavities. The town's many older structures and expansive yards require experienced professionals who understand both structural bee removal and the unique characteristics of Westchester properties.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove bees from my Somers property?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day bee removal service in Somers for most situations. Emergency removals for bees inside living spaces are prioritized. After your call, we typically arrive within 2-4 hours to assess the situation and can often complete removal during the first visit, depending on hive location and size.

faqs.question: What's included in the $350-$550 bee removal price?
faqs.answer: Our pricing includes full inspection, safe bee and hive removal, treatment of the affected area, and initial sealing of entry points. The final cost depends on hive size, location accessibility, and whether the bees are in a structure requiring wall or roof access. We provide upfront quotes before beginning work with no hidden fees.

faqs.question: Do you relocate bees or exterminate them in Somers?
faqs.answer: Whenever possible, we relocate honey bees to local beekeepers or apiaries, as they're vital pollinators. For aggressive Africanized bees or situations where relocation isn't safe or feasible, we use targeted extermination methods. We always assess each situation individually and recommend the most appropriate and environmentally responsible solution.

faqs.question: Will bees return after removal from my Somers home?
faqs.answer: Our service includes removing all hive material and pheromone traces that attract new swarms, significantly reducing the chance of return. We seal primary entry points and provide recommendations for additional exclusion work. We also offer a service guarantee—if bees return to the same location within 30 days, we'll return at no additional charge.
